segments.text: A few days later Jesus returned home to Capernaum, and news spread that he was there.
So many people crowded inside the house that it was packed, even outside the door, as Jesus explained the message to them.
Four men had brought a man who was paralyzed,

but they could not get near Jesus because of the crowds. So they went up on the roof and took it apart. After they had made an opening above Jesus, they lowered down the mat with the paralyzed man lying on it.
When Jesus saw the trust these men had, Jesus said to the paralyzed man, {
Friend, your sins are forgiven.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Some of the religious teachers sitting there thought to themselves,
Why is he talking like this? He is blaspheming! Who can forgive sins? Only God can do that!
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Jesus knew right away what they were thinking. He said to them, {
Why are you thinking like this?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: What's easier: to say to the paralyzed man, ‘Your sins are forgiven,’ or ‘Get up, pick up your mat, and walk’?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But to convince you that the Son of man has the right to forgive sins,
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I say to you (the paralyzed man), ‘Get up, pick up your mat, and go home.’
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: He stood up, picked up his mat, and walked out in front of everyone there. They were all amazed, and praised God, saying, {
We've never ever seen anything like this!
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Jesus went out beside the sea once more and taught the crowds that came to him.
As he walked along, he saw Levi son of Alphaeus sitting at the tax collector's booth. {
Follow me,
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Jesus told him. Levi got up and followed Jesus.
That evening Jesus ate dinner at Levi's house. Many tax collectors and {
sinners
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: joined Jesus and his disciples for the meal, for there were many of these people that followed Jesus.
When the religious leaders of the Pharisees saw Jesus eating with such people, they asked Jesus' disciples, {
Why does he eat with tax collectors and sinners?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: When Jesus heard this, he told them, {
It's not healthy people who need a doctor, but those who are sick. I haven't come to invite those who live right, but those who don't—the sinners.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Now John's disciples and the Pharisees were fasting.  Some of them came to Jesus, and asked him, {
Why is it that John's disciples and the Pharisees fast, but your disciples don't?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Do wedding guests fast while the bridegroom is with them?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Jesus asked them.
No. While the bridegroom's with them, they can't fast.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But the day is coming when the bridegroom will be taken from them, and then they'll fast.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: No one puts a patch that's not shrunk on old clothes. Otherwise the new piece will shrink away from the old, and make the tear worse.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: No one puts new wine in old wineskins. Otherwise the wine will burst the wineskins, and both the wine and wineskins will be wasted. No. You put new wine in new wineskins.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: One Sabbath day as Jesus was walking through the grain fields, his disciples started picking heads of grain as they walked along.
The Pharisees asked Jesus, {
Look, why are they doing what is not permitted on the Sabbath?
segments.speaker: The Pharisees

segments.text: Haven't you ever read what David did when he and his men were hungry and in need?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Jesus asked them.
He went into God's house when Abiathar was high priest, and ate the consecrated bread which no one except the priests are permitted to eat, and gave it to his men too.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: The Sabbath was made for your benefit, not for you to benefit the Sabbath,
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: he told them.
So the Son of man is Lord even of the Sabbath.
segments.speaker: Jesus
